scripts.env:setup: wp-env run cli wp theme activate the-drafting-table && (wp-env run cli wp plugin is-active the-drafting-table-companion || wp-env run cli wp plugin activate the-drafting-table-companion) && wp-env run cli wp plugin install wordpress-importer --activate --force && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/themes/the-drafting-table/tests/wp-env/install-demo.php
scripts.themecheck: wp-env run cli wp plugin install theme-check --activate && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/themes/the-drafting-table/run-themecheck.php
scripts.qa: npm run env:start && npm run env:setup && composer run lint:php && npm run lint:node && npm run test:node && npm run check:docs && npm run check:qa-parity && npm run test:phpunit:coverage && npm run test:phpunit:coverage:check && npm run wporg:check && npm run test:smoke
scripts.qa:local: npm run env:start && npm run env:setup && composer run lint:php && npm run lint:node && npm run test:node && npm run check:docs && npm run check:qa-parity && npm run test:phpunit:coverage && npm run test:phpunit:coverage:check && npm run wporg:check && npm run test:smoke:local
